prompt_text: A mid-size e-commerce company notices their checkout conversion rate dropped 15% over the last month. No code changes were deployed. Using first principles, analyze what could be happening and propose a diagnostic plan.

rubric_dimensions.name: Decomposition
rubric_dimensions.description: Ability to break the problem into fundamental components

rubric_dimensions.name: Hypothesis Quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Strength and specificity of proposed hypotheses

rubric_dimensions.name: Reasoning Depth
rubric_dimensions.description: Depth of logical reasoning and analysis

rubric_dimensions.name: Honesty
rubric_dimensions.description: Acknowledging uncertainty and limitations
